pageContext.name: Predator Bio-Helmet
pageContext.description: If it bleeds we can kill it   To celebrate the 35th Anniversary of the original Predator movie, Hollywood Collectibles Group has accurately recreated the Predator Bio-Helmet. This Bio-Helmet can trace its lineage to an original screen-used helmet for authenticity and accuracy.  The Bio-Helmet, or Environment Helmet, can be removed from its display stand and features a functioning light-up LED target acquisition system , and a highly detailed interior.  This intricately detailed, Museum Quality piece is constructed from fiberglass, resin, and mixed media and then hand painted to the finest detail, with authentic weathering for added realism!   This amazing life-size Prop Replica is available in a strictly Limited Edition of 500 individually numbered pieces Worldwide.   Hunt down the Bio-Helmet and add to your Predator collection today, before it hunts you!
